headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' https://*.firebaseapp.com https://*.googleapis.com https://apis.google.com https://www.gstatic.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; connect-src 'self' https: wss:; font-src 'self' https:; frame-src https://*.firebaseapp.com https://accounts.google.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'
